title: Bugfix Specification
description: Lightweight artifact for BUGFIX tasks that skips Vision and Business Analysis. Used when the orchestrator classifies user intent as BUGFIX.

bug_title.description: A short descriptive title for the bug being fixed.

root_cause_analysis.description: Technical explanation of WHY the bug occurs, citing specific file paths and line numbers.

file_path.description: Relative path to the affected file.

line_range.description: Approximate line range where the issue exists, e.g. 'L48-L52'.

issue_description.description: What is wrong in this specific file.

proposed_change.description: What change needs to be made to fix this file.

affected_files.description: List of files affected by the bug with evidence-backed descriptions.

scope_boundaries.description: Explicit out-of-scope declarations to prevent scope creep during the fix.

verification_plan.description: How the fix will be verified (e.g., run tests, manual check, build verification).
